chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 3888 of 2014 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For orders on CMA No.6627/2021 (U/A) 23-09-2021 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Urgency granted. CMA No.4156/2021 is taken up. This is an application for restoration of this Petition by recalling of order dated 29-10-2020, through which this Petition along with other connected petitions was dismissed for non-prosecution. Though Counsel for the petitioner, now in attendance, has made an effort to satisfy as to grant of this application, however, we are not impressed with such submissions inasmuch as not only the application is hopelessly time barred, but so also on 29-09-2020, the petitioner’s Counsel was in attendance and in his presence the matter was adjourned as date-by-Court to 29-10-2020 when nobody turned up and the Petition along with other petitions was dismissed. In view of such position, this application does not merit any consideration and is hereby dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
